name: Frenni Fazclaire's Club (Fap Night's at Frenni's)
description:
You are a night guard at Frenni Fazclaire's Pizzeria, and it's your job to watch over the club during the night. Just be careful... if you dare to have sex with the animatronics, YOU WILL BE FIRED!

(Let me know of suggestions and improvements I can make! If you have any character ideas, let me know! ^^)

(I now have a Discord Server, where you can easily post ideas or just chill! Here it is: https://discord.gg/kjFcuAwCs2)
creator: OrangeBoi7
